data.name: Login.SignInToAccount
data.value: Sign in to your JAA account

data.name: ShopLogin.AccessDashboard
data.value: Access your JAA dashboard to manage jobs, track earnings, and connect with customers in need.

data.name: ShopLogin.InstantJobAlertsDesc
data.value: Get notified the moment a customer nearby needs help.

data.name: ShopLogin.EarningsTrackingDesc
data.value: Monitor your revenue and completed jobs in real time.

data.name: ShopLogin.CustomerReviewsDesc
data.value: Build your reputation with verified customer ratings.

data.name: ShopLogin.VerifiedBadgeDesc
data.value: Earn trust with the official JAA verification mark.

data.name: ShopLogin.SignInToShopAccount
data.value: Sign in to your shop account

data.name: ShopReg.ApplicationReview
data.value: Join the JAA network — your application will be reviewed by our admin team

data.name: ShopReg.CertificateNote
data.value: Upload your government business certificate (PDF, JPG, PNG). Visible only to admins.

data.name: Cust.Tip3
data.value: Keep your phone available for the mechanic.

data.name: RH.TapToSetPin
data.value: Tap the map to set a custom pin

data.name: RH.CouldNotDetect
data.value: Could not detect location — tap the map to set it manually.

data.name: RH.GeolocationNotSupported
data.value: Geolocation not supported — tap the map to place your pin.

data.name: RH.MoreDetailFasterHelp
data.value: The more detail, the faster we help

data.name: RH.SituationPlaceholder
data.value: e.g. Car won't start, engine makes a clicking noise…

data.name: RH.SignInNote
data.value: You'll be asked to sign in or create a free account.

data.name: RH.PendingSignIn
data.value: Please sign in or create a free account to submit your roadside assistance request. Your details have been saved.

data.name: RH.DispatchNote
data.value: A verified mechanic will be dispatched to your GPS location.

data.name: RH.GpsError1
data.value: Location access was denied. Please allow it in your browser settings and try again.

data.name: RH.GpsError2
data.value: Your location is currently unavailable. Check GPS or network connection.

data.name: RH.GpsError3
data.value: Location request timed out. Please try again.

data.name: RH.GpsErrorFallback
data.value: Could not detect your location. Please try again.

data.name: RH.GeolocationNotSupportedBtn
data.value: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.

data.name: Track.MechanicHeading
data.value: Mechanic is heading to your GPS location

data.name: Track.MechanicAtLocation
data.value: Mechanic is at your location — diagnosing now

data.name: Track.WorkOnVehicle
data.value: Work is in progress on your vehicle

data.name: Track.StayCalm
data.value: Stay calm and safe. Our verified mechanic is coming to your exact location. Keep your phone line open.

data.name: Track.NotifyingShops
data.value: All verified shops in your area are being notified. This usually takes under a minute.

data.name: Track.RequestNoLongerActive
data.value: This request is no longer active.

data.name: Track.FeedbackHelps
data.value: Your feedback helps other drivers choose the right shop.

data.name: Home.HeroTitle
data.value: Stranded? Help Is On The Way.

data.name: Home.HeroLead
data.value: JAA connects Jordanian drivers with verified nearby repair shops instantly — describe your situation, share your location, and let us handle the rest.

data.name: Home.HeroSampleSituation
data.value: The car won't start — clicking sound when turning the key.

data.name: Home.Step01Desc
data.value: Create a free account in seconds to request roadside help.

data.name: Home.Step02Desc
data.value: Share your GPS location and describe what's wrong with your car.

data.name: Home.Step03Desc
data.value: A verified shop accepts and dispatches a mechanic. Track live and rate after.

data.name: Home.AutoGPSDetectionDesc
data.value: One tap shares your exact location with the mechanic.

data.name: Home.RealTimeTrackingDesc
data.value: Follow live status from Pending to Completed.

data.name: Home.VerifiedShopsOnlyDesc
data.value: Every shop is manually reviewed by JAA admins.

data.name: Home.RatingsFeedbackDesc
data.value: Rate shops after every service to keep quality high.

data.name: Home.ShopFeature2
data.value: Update job status in real time

data.name: Home.BrokenDown
data.value: Broken Down? We're Ready When You Are.

data.name: Home.JoinThousands
data.value: Join thousands of Jordanian drivers who trust JAA for fast, verified roadside assistance.

data.name: About.HeroDesc
data.value: JAA is Jordan's first digital marketplace for on-demand roadside assistance — connecting motorists with verified mechanics in minutes, not hours.

data.name: About.MissionText
data.value: To bridge the trust and transparency gap in Jordan's roadside assistance market — replacing stressful street negotiations with standardized flat rates and automated GPS matching. We connect stranded motorists directly to independent mechanics and tow operators through a single, reliable platform.

data.name: About.EverythingYouNeed
data.value: Everything you need when your car lets you down.

data.name: About.GPSDispatchDesc
data.value: Real-time location sharing connects you to the nearest available mechanic instantly — no calls, no waiting.

data.name: About.FixedPricingDesc
data.value: What you see is what you pay. No negotiations, no surprise fees, ever.

data.name: About.VerifiedMechanicsDesc
data.value: Every service provider on our platform is background-checked, verified, and rated by real customers.

data.name: About.Coverage247Desc
data.value: Available around the clock, 365 days a year across Jordan. Day or night, we've got you.

data.name: About.RatedReviewedDesc
data.value: Transparent feedback system so you always know who's coming and what to expect.

data.name: About.NoAppNeededDesc
data.value: Works entirely from your browser. Request help instantly — no download required.

data.name: About.BuiltOnTrust
data.value: Built on trust, driven by honesty.

data.name: About.CorePrinciples
data.value: Every decision we make is guided by three core principles that put the motorist first.

data.name: About.Value1Desc
data.value: No hidden fees, no bait-and-switch. Price is locked the moment you request help.

data.name: About.Value2Desc
data.value: We optimize every part of the flow — from GPS detection to driver dispatch — to minimize your wait time.

data.name: About.Value3Desc
data.value: Verified providers, real-time status updates, and a support team you can actually reach.

data.name: About.ReadyToGetOnRoad
data.value: Ready to get on the road?

data.name: About.JoinThousands
data.value: Join thousands of motorists who trust JAA when it matters most.

data.name: Contact.HeroDesc
data.value: Reach out anytime — our team is available 24/7 for questions, support, and partnership inquiries.

data.name: Contact.MessagePlaceholder
data.value: Tell us more about your question or issue…

data.name: Contact.MessageSentSuccess
data.value: Message sent! We'll get back to you within 2 hours.

data.name: Suspend.Msg
data.value: Your account has been temporarily suspended. You can still view your history, but you cannot submit new service requests. Please contact support@jaa.jo for assistance.

data.name: Suspend.DashMsg
data.value: Your account has been temporarily suspended. You can still access your account and view your request history, but you cannot submit new service requests at this time. Please contact support for further assistance.

data.name: Suspend.ActionBlocked
data.value: This action is not available while your account is suspended. Please contact support.

data.name: Footer.Desc
data.value: Jordan Automobile Association — connecting stranded drivers with verified repair shops and mechanics, instantly and transparently.

data.name: Footer.Copyright
data.value: Jordan Automobile Association. All rights reserved.

data.name: FB.CommentPlaceholder
data.value: Tell others about the mechanic's professionalism, response time, and pricing…

data.name: FB.SubmitNote
data.value: Your review helps other drivers choose trusted shops.

data.name: Insp.FeePaymentSub
data.value: Pay the dispatch fee to activate your request

data.name: Insp.FeeNote
data.value: This fee covers mechanic travel costs and is required regardless of repair decision.

data.name: Quot.ReviewApprove
data.value: Review and approve the mechanic's diagnosis

data.name: Quot.RejectionPlaceholder
data.value: Tell the shop why you're rejecting...

data.name: Shops.HeroDesc
data.value: Every shop on JAA is reviewed and verified. Filter by city to find one near you.

data.name: Shops.NoVerifiedShops
data.value: No verified shops are listed yet.

data.name: ShopDtl.NoReviewsFirst
data.value: No reviews yet — be the first!

data.name: ShopDtl.StrandedNearby
data.value: Stranded nearby? Request roadside help from this shop instantly.

data.name: ShopDtl.NeedAssistance
data.value: Need roadside assistance? Sign in to request help from this shop.

data.name: ShopDB.ShopUnderReview
data.value: Your shop is under review. You can't receive requests until verified.

data.name: ShopIR.RequestsAppearHere
data.value: Customer help requests appear here in real time.

data.name: ShopAJ.AcceptRequestFirst
data.value: Accept a request from Incoming Requests to start a job.

data.name: ShopAJ.ResolutionPlaceholder
data.value: e.g. Fixed on-site / Towing to shop

data.name: ShopCJ.NoJobsDesc
data.value: Jobs you mark as completed will appear here with full details and payment info.

data.name: ShopEarn.NoPaymentsDesc
data.value: Complete jobs to start tracking your earnings here.

data.name: ShopRev.NoReviewsDesc
data.value: Customer feedback appears here after completed jobs.

data.name: ShopMech.NoMechanicsDesc
data.value: Add your first mechanic to start accepting requests.

data.name: ShopMS.ManageDetails
data.value: Manage your shop profile and details

data.name: ShopMS.DescHint
data.value: Shown to customers browsing the shop directory.

data.name: ShopMS.MapHint
data.value: click the map or drag the pin to set your exact position

data.name: ShopMS.ClickMapToPin
data.value: Click the map to pin your shop location

data.name: ShopMS.LogoHint
data.value: Shown on your public shop card and directory listing.

data.name: ShopMS.ClickOrDrag
data.value: Click or drag & drop to upload your logo

data.name: ShopMS.LogoFormat
data.value: PNG, JPG, WEBP — recommended 256×256 px or larger

data.name: ShopMS.ChangesVisible
data.value: Changes are visible on your public shop page immediately after saving.

data.name: ShopMS.GeoNotSupported
data.value: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.

data.name: ShopMS.GeoAccessDenied
data.value: Location access denied. Please allow location in your browser settings.

data.name: ShopMS.GeoUnavailable
data.value: Location unavailable. Check your GPS or network.

data.name: ShopMS.GeoTimeout
data.value: Location request timed out. Try again.

data.name: ShopAR.SelectAvailable
data.value: Select an available mechanic for this job

data.name: ShopSQ.PageSub
data.value: Diagnose the issue and quote the repair cost

data.name: ShopSQ.DiagnosisPlaceholder
data.value: Describe the problem found and what work is needed...

data.name: ShopPA.ReviewDesc
data.value: Your shop registration has been submitted and is currently under review by our admin team. You'll be able to access all shop features once your shop is approved.

data.name: ShopRej.Desc
data.value: Unfortunately your shop registration was not approved at this time.

data.name: ShopAM.PageSub
data.value: New mechanics require admin approval before they can receive jobs

data.name: ShopAM.PendingNote
data.value: This mechanic will be Pending until an admin approves them.

data.name: FP.Sub
data.value: Enter your phone number to reset your password

data.name: FP.Hint
data.value: Enter the phone number associated with your account. You will be taken directly to the password reset screen.

data.name: RP.Sub
data.value: Choose a strong password for your account

data.name: AD.Desc
data.value: You don't have permission to view this page.

data.name: Pay.PageSub
data.value: Simulated payment gateway — no real charge

data.name: Pay.DemoDesc
data.value: This is a simulated payment. No real transaction will occur. Enter any card details.

data.name: Map.PageSub
data.value: Find verified repair shops on the map

data.name: Map.ClickMarker
data.value: Click a marker to see shop details

data.name: APM.AllReviewed
data.value: All mechanic applications have been reviewed.

data.name: ASet.PageSub
data.value: Configure platform fees, rates, and preferences

data.name: StepDesc.InspectionPaid
data.value: Inspection fee paid — request visible to shops

data.name: StepDesc.Accepted
data.value: A mechanic is assigned and on the way

data.name: Msg.AccountDeactivated
data.value: Your account has been deactivated. Please contact support at support@jaa.jo

data.name: Msg.NoAccountFound
data.value: No account found with that phone number.

data.name: Msg.PasswordResetSuccess
data.value: Password reset successfully. Sign in with your new password.

data.name: Msg.ShopPendingApproval
data.value: Registration submitted. Your shop is pending admin approval. You'll be notified once approved.

data.name: Msg.AccountDeactivatedNoRequests
data.value: Your account is deactivated. You cannot submit new requests.

data.name: Msg.InspectionFeePaid
data.value: Inspection fee paid. Your request is now visible to nearby shops.

data.name: Msg.RepairApproved
data.value: Repair approved. The mechanic will proceed with the repair.

data.name: Msg.QuotationRejected
data.value: Repair quotation rejected. The shop has been notified.

data.name: Msg.CannotCancel
data.value: This request can no longer be cancelled.

data.name: Msg.FeedbackOnlyAfterComplete
data.value: You can only leave feedback after the job is completed.

data.name: Msg.AlreadyRated
data.value: You have already rated this job.

data.name: Msg.ShopMustBeApproved
data.value: Shop must be approved before accepting requests.

data.name: Msg.NoAvailableMechanics
data.value: You have no available approved mechanics. Add or approve mechanics first.

data.name: Msg.RequestUnavailable
data.value: This request is no longer available.

data.name: Msg.QuotationTiming
data.value: Quotation can only be submitted after mechanic arrives.

data.name: Msg.QuotationSubmitted
data.value: Quotation submitted. Waiting for customer approval.

data.name: Msg.MechanicAdded
data.value: Mechanic added and pending admin approval.

data.name: Msg.NationalIdExists
data.value: A mechanic with this National ID already exists.
